title: Regenerations?
description: This mod revamps existing biomes in a vanilla manner
body:
This mod revamps existing biomes in a vanilla manner to be as cool as recently updated biomes.

REQUIRES TERRABLENDER!!!!

![Visual Changelog](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/Fjs23YlW/images/7f794aeb35b7c653b6d2f0c666f27e33f363f5cf.png)

Mod currently includes...

**New maple biome!**
*Newly mapled trees!**
	Newly mapled trees!
	Sugary Sap!	
	Falling leaves!
	New Wood!

& Branching trees!

*Refine sap into a rejuvenating syrup!*
Harvest maple sap
& smelt it into syrup!

*Tons of new blocks!*
Perfect for making a sugar shack!

*Syryp tapping*
Hold a tapper in your offhand, hold a bucket and harvest from a overflowing log

**Revamped birch forests!**

*Brand new birch trees!*
	Taller!
		Windier!
			& Knoted!

*Oyster shrooms!*
Grows plentifully on the
bark of birch trees!
		Grow em’
		Roast em’
		Eat em!

*Brand new plants!*
Christmas Flowers,
Fireweed, general
prettiness!

*Fireweed Syrup!*
Early game healing potion,
surgary, watery fireweedy
goodness!

*Results may very
